name: agentbox-consultants
description: Consultant tier MCP servers for agentbox (PRD-005 / ADR-011) — codex, gemini, zai, perplexity, deepseek

scripts.test: node -e "['codex','gemini','zai','perplexity','deepseek','shared/consultant-base','shared/memory-logger','shared/spawn-cli'].forEach(f => { try { require('./' + (f.includes('/') ? f : f + '/server')); } catch(e) { console.error(f, 'load failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); } }); console.log('all consultants load cleanly');"
